channel.title: bips on ₿itcoin Transcripts
channel.description: Recent content in bips on ₿itcoin Transcripts

item.title: BIPs Editors and Reviewers
item.description: This year the repository has an increased number of submissions compared to prior years Only one BIP Editor had been regularly active on the repository in the first quarter There is an open proposal to select a new BIP Editor team on the mailing list People that are interested should feel free to start reviewing some BIPs to demonstrate Generally, the repository is open to anyone to comment, more participation from the broader ecosystem would be appreciated Feel free to ping people with relevant expertise to point out BIPs that might be of interest to review
